prompt: Execute Phase A. State-scanner reports: uncommitted changes in 3 files, working tree dirty. Feature: Add payment gateway integration.

assertions.name: detects_unclean_state
assertions.description: Should detect and report unclean working tree state

assertions.name: blocks_or_warns
assertions.description: Should block execution or issue a clear warning
assertions.check: output.includes('WARNING') || output.includes('BLOCKED') || output.includes('cannot proceed') || output.includes('stash') || output.includes('警告')

assertions.name: provides_resolution_steps
assertions.description: Should provide steps to resolve the unclean state
assertions.check: output.includes('git stash') || output.includes('commit') || output.includes('resolve') || output.includes('clean') || output.includes('action')
